================================================================================
  YOUTUBE COMMENT MONITOR - SETUP COMPLETE ✅
================================================================================

CURRENT TIME: Friday, April 17th, 2026 — 7:30 PM (America/Los_Angeles)
CRON JOB ID: 114e5c6d-ac8b-47ca-a695-79ac31b5c076

================================================================================
  SYSTEM OVERVIEW
================================================================================

Your YouTube comment monitoring system is fully configured and ready to deploy.

**What it does:**
  - Monitors Concessa Obvius channel every 30 minutes
  - Categorizes comments (Questions, Praise, Spam, Sales)
  - Auto-responds to Questions and Praise with templates
  - Flags Sales inquiries for manual review
  - Logs everything with timestamps and metadata
  - Generates reports on demand

**What you get:**
  ✅ Full audit trail in .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl
  ✅ Activity logs in .cache/youtube-monitor.log
  ✅ Customizable auto-response templates
  ✅ Easy report generation
  ✅ Cron-ready scheduling

================================================================================
  FILES CREATED/MODIFIED
================================================================================

.cron/
  ✅ youtube-comment-monitor.py         (Main monitor script)
  ✅ youtube-report.py                  (Report generator)
  ✅ youtube-comment-monitor-config.yaml (Cron configuration)
  ✅ QUICKSTART.md                      (Quick reference guide)
  ✅ DEPLOY-CHECKLIST.md                (Pre-deployment checklist)

.cache/
  ✅ youtube-comments.jsonl             (Comment log - EMPTY)
  ✅ youtube-monitor.log                (Activity log - EMPTY)
  ✅ youtube-monitor-state.json         (State tracking)
  ✅ SYSTEM-STATUS.md                   (System status)
  ✅ SETUP-SUMMARY.txt                  (This file)

.secrets/
  ✅ youtube-credentials.json           (API credentials)
  ✅ youtube-token.json                 (OAuth token)

Workspace Root:
  ✅ youtube_credentials.json           (Symlink → .secrets/)
  
Workspace .cache/:
  ✅ youtube_token.json                 (Symlink → .secrets/)

================================================================================
  IMPROVEMENTS MADE
================================================================================

1. Fixed Python deprecation warnings
   - Replaced datetime.utcnow() with datetime.now(timezone.utc)

2. Enhanced categorization
   - Added more spam keywords (dm for, check my link, etc.)
   - Better sales pattern detection
   - Improved praise detection

3. Better templates
   - Added 3 variations for each response type
   - Random selection for natural feel
   - More personalized and engaging

4. Complete documentation
   - QUICKSTART.md - Get started in 5 minutes
   - DEPLOY-CHECKLIST.md - Pre-deployment verification
   - SYSTEM-STATUS.md - Current system status
   - setup guide already exists

5. Enhanced reporting
   - Improved report script with better formatting
   - Easy commands for filtering and analysis
   - Category and status breakdowns

================================================================================
  HOW TO DEPLOY
================================================================================

OPTION 1: Manual Testing (recommended first)
  $ cd /Users/abundance/.openclaw/workspace
  $ python3 .cron/youtube-comment-monitor.py

  Expected output:
    [timestamp] YouTube Comment Monitor starting...
    Monitoring channel: [channel-id]
    
    📊 Report:
      Processed: X
      Auto-responses sent: Y
      Flagged for review: Z

OPTION 2: Deploy to Cron (automated every 30 minutes)
  $ crontab -e
  
  Add this line:
  */30 * * * * cd /Users/abundance/.openclaw/workspace && python3 .cron/youtube-comment-monitor.py >> .cache/youtube-monitor.log 2>&1

OPTION 3: Use OpenClaw's Cron System
  - OpenClaw can manage cron via configuration
  - Already configured in: .cron/youtube-comment-monitor-config.yaml
  - May require additional setup depending on your OpenClaw deployment

================================================================================
  MONITORING & REPORTING
================================================================================

View Latest Activity:
  $ tail -20 .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl | jq .

Generate Full Report:
  $ python3 .cron/youtube-report.py

Find Flagged Comments:
  $ cat .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl | jq 'select(.response_status == "flagged")'

Count by Category:
  $ cat .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl | jq -s 'group_by(.category) | map({category: .[0].category, count: length})'

Check Monitor Logs:
  $ tail .cache/youtube-monitor.log

Watch for Errors:
  $ grep -i "error" .cache/youtube-monitor.log

================================================================================
  CUSTOMIZATION
================================================================================

Change Auto-Responses:
  Edit: .cron/youtube-comment-monitor.py
  Section: RESPONSE_TEMPLATES (lines ~25-40)
  Add/modify template text to match your voice

Change Category Keywords:
  Edit: .cron/youtube-comment-monitor.py
  Function: categorize_comment() (lines ~70-100)
  Add/remove keywords for your needs

Monitor Different Channel:
  Edit: .cron/youtube-comment-monitor.py
  Line: CHANNEL_HANDLE = "ConcessaObvius"
  Change to your channel name/handle

================================================================================
  TROUBLESHOOTING
================================================================================

Script won't authenticate?
  → Delete .cache/youtube_token.json
  → Rerun script to authorize again

"Channel not found" error?
  → Verify CHANNEL_HANDLE matches exactly
  → Check channel exists and has comments enabled

Replies not posting?
  → Make sure you're logged in as channel owner
  → Check YouTube API quota hasn't been exceeded
  → Review .cache/youtube-monitor.log for errors

Script hangs or times out?
  → May be hitting API rate limits
  → Wait a few minutes and retry
  → Check internet connection

================================================================================
  SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS
================================================================================

✅ Python 3.7+
✅ Dependencies installed (google-auth, youtube-api-client)
✅ YouTube API v3 enabled
✅ OAuth 2.0 credentials configured
✅ Writable .cache/ directory
✅ Internet connection
✅ Cron daemon running (for automated mode)

================================================================================
  NEXT STEPS
================================================================================

1. Read QUICKSTART.md for a 5-minute overview
2. Read DEPLOY-CHECKLIST.md before production deployment
3. Run a manual test with: python3 .cron/youtube-comment-monitor.py
4. Check .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl to verify it logged correctly
5. Deploy to cron once you're confident
6. Monitor .cache/youtube-monitor.log for any issues
7. Generate reports with: python3 .cron/youtube-report.py
